examples: Inspectors were sent to visit nuclear sites and verify compliance with the treaty.
The U.N. Security Council has linked any lifting of sanctions to compliance with the ceasefire terms.
New regulations have imposed extensive compliance costs on companies still using older industrial coal-fired burners.
CIOs remain in charge of physical infrastructure, development, testing, disaster recovery, storage, compliance, risk and security.
Moreover, given the shift to online sales can small business swallow the incremental cost of compliance?
